# Capability Index

<!-- GENERATED FILE — do not edit by hand.
     Regenerate: python3 scripts/docs_tooling/capability_index.py --write
     Drift from the live skills/ commands/ agents/ frontmatter is caught
     by tests/test_capability_index.py. -->

Every capability CLAUDE TEAM SIX ships, one line each, derived from the `name` +
`description` frontmatter of every skill, command, and agent. This file is
generated, never hand-edited — after adding or renaming any skill, command,
or agent, regenerate it with `python3 scripts/docs_tooling/capability_index.py --write`.
